_disabled_notes.instahyre: All API endpoints (/api/v1/opportunity, /api/v1/jobs) return 404; /search-jobs/ returns 403. Disabled until a working endpoint is found.
_disabled_notes.wellfound_rss: Cloudflare WAF returns 403 on all unauthenticated requests. Use Apify wellfound_scraper on full runs instead.
_disabled_notes.linkedin_guest: Unauthenticated LinkedIn endpoint returns 0 jobs consistently (soft-blocked). LinkedIn data sourced exclusively via Apify on full runs.

_notes: Apify actors are used only for sources that block native scraping (LinkedIn/Glassdoor/Indeed via proxy, Naukri=recaptcha, Cutshort=client-side API, Wellfound=Cloudflare). _native_sources are scraped free by scripts/scrapers/*. ambitionbox_scraper is salary research only (Layer B), not job listings. hasjob now uses Atom feed (/feed). yc_startup now uses HN Firebase Jobs API. instahyre and wellfound_rss are disabled — see disabled_native_sources.
